query:
SELECT
                    p.id AS "user_id!",
                    p.username AS "username!",
                    p.display_name,
                    p.avatar_url,
                    f.created_at AS "created_at!"
                   FROM friendships f
                   JOIN profiles p ON p.id = f.requester_id
                   WHERE f.status = 'pending' AND f.addressee_id = $1
                   ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
